title: Dev v0.5.13 Full Submission Payload Fix
notes:
Changes:
- Submit to Master now requires the full live item array.
- Submission JSON includes:
  items: full item array
  fullItemsIncluded: true
  fullItemCount: 302
  itemPreview: first 8 items
  summary counts
- Uploads JSON to GitHub and reads it back.
- Verifies GitHub remote item count matches local item count.
- Removes old misleading Remote feedback ID result text.
